description: S&P 500 candidate seed for the LTHCS universe expansion. Contains 333 tickers that are NOT in the current production universe (data/lthcs/universe.json, 169 tickers as of 2026-05-18). Curated from a recent S&P 500 list (verified against public Wikipedia constituent list snapshot). GICS sectors and inferred maturity stages are best-effort starter values — the operator should review/override before any wave goes live. Combined production+candidate brings the universe to ~502 tickers (full S&P 500 coverage).
source: Curated subset of S&P 500 constituents (Wikipedia, fortune 500 cross-reference). Maturity stage inferred from market-cap heuristic at 2026-05-19 close.

maturity_stage_heuristic.mature_compounder: market_cap > $200B AND >20y public AND stable margins
maturity_stage_heuristic.growth_compounder: high revenue growth (>20% YoY) OR IPO <5y ago
maturity_stage_heuristic.recovery_rerating: former leader currently re-rating off a trough

tickers.name: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc.
